situational_context: Running comeback Week 5: 6 runs completed since May 3 gap-break. Run #6 shortened to 3.78 km (May 31) — 5 km consolidation palier NOT yet validated (need 3 consecutive clean 5 km runs; currently 0 after shortening). Primary modality: e-bike commuting (~38 km round trip on sur-site days). Chronic load declined to 15.7 (from 22.3 on May 14) — detraining status driven by sparse activity density (3 active days in last 7). ACWR 0.78 — below safe-zone lower bound (0.80), indicating underloading. HRV 36 (BALANCED, down from 40). RHR 48.6 bpm (stable-improved from 49). VO2max running improved to 39.4 (from 38.3). Weight 102.97 kg (down from 104.1, healthy rate ~0.37 kg/week). Two sur-site days this week (Thu-Fri) will provide commute load. Baby impact on schedule normal — no material sleep disruption detected.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site Guidewire — commute ebike/gravel (~38 km)

recommendations.text: Complete Run #7 (Wed) and Run #8 (Sun) at full 5 km to restart the consolidation count. Run #6 was shortened to 3.78 km — need 3 consecutive clean 5 km runs to advance to the next distance palier. FC target ≤137 bpm. Zero post-run pain >24h is the gate.
recommendations.measurable: Both runs logged at ≥5 km with no localized pain lasting >24h post-run

recommendations.text: Increase overall activity density to arrest chronic load decline. Target ≥5 active days this week. Sur-site commutes (Thu-Fri) plus 3 training sessions (Wed, Sat, Sun) provide the structure. Chronic load has dropped 30% in 17 days — continued decline risks losing the fitness base built through cycling.
recommendations.measurable: Acute load 7d ≥14 by end of week; chronic load decline rate slows to <5% week-over-week

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake to ≥150g consistently. Current 7d average is 137g with high variability (98-171g). At 103 kg during mild deficit, 1.5-1.6 g/kg/day protects lean mass and supports tendon collagen synthesis during running comeback.
recommendations.measurable: ≥5 of 7 days at ≥150g protein logged in nutrition tracker

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if continues declining below 14 by next week
markers_to_watch.reason: Down 30% in 17 days (22.3→15.7). Detraining status confirmed by Garmin. Need to stabilize through consistent activity before rebuilding.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops below 33 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Declined from 40 to 36 over 17 days. Still BALANCED but trending down. Further decline could indicate accumulated fatigue or illness.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized tendon/joint pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #6 was shortened — unclear if pain-related. At 103 kg, tissue tolerance remains the primary limiter during comeback.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if loss rate exceeds 1 kg/week sustained over 2+ weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Current rate 0.37 kg/week is healthy. Faster loss compromises tendon adaptation per comeback protocol.
